title: protocodon robinsiae
side_effects: Protocodon robinsiae can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate, nausea, and dizziness in some individuals. In severe cases, improper use of this plant may lead to allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and respiratory issues. Additionally, excessive consumption of Protocodon robinsiae can cause stomach problems, including vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using this plant to avoid any potential health risks.
